# nxt-json-view documentation

> Angular component for interactive json view.

> Generated by compodoc 2.0.0 at 2026-07-13T17:07:46.090Z, llm-md export.

## Components

### JsonViewComponent

File: `src/lib/json-view/json-view.component.ts`
Selector: `nxt-json-view`

Inputs:
- `data: any` — JSON data, any valid JSON object
- `levelLabels: LevelLabels` — Custom labels for elements within the hierarcy
- `levelOpen: number` — Initial number of levels to be expanded; to expand / collapse the view after initial render, use expandTo / collapseTo

Methods:
- `collapseTo(level: number): void` — Collapse any open items above the given level
- `expandTo(level: number): void` — Expand all items up to the given level
- `ngAfterViewChecked(): void`

## Services / Injectables

### ExpanderService

File: `src/lib/expander/expander.service.ts`
providedIn: `root`

Methods:
- `addItem(item: JsonViewItemComponent): void`
- `collapseTo(level: number): void`
- `expandTo(level: number): void`
- `removeItem(item: JsonViewItemComponent): void`

## Interfaces

### LevelLabels

File: `src/lib/utils/interfaces.ts`
